# PrimaSTEM

> Screen-free coding and mathematics for children ages 4–10. Wooden programmable robot with tangible NFC command tokens.

PrimaSTEM is a wooden educational robot made in Cannes, France. Children place NFC command tokens on a control board to build programs — no screen, no app required. Two curriculum levels in one device: logic for ages 4–7 and mathematics for ages 7–10. The robot draws geometric figures (stars, spirals, polygons) making math visible. CE & UKCA certified.

- [Home](https://primastem.com/): Overview, key features, pricing, video demo

- [Parents](https://primastem.com/parents/): Home learning, age guidance, what's included
- [About](https://primastem.com/about/): Company story, team, mission, certifications
- [Contact](https://primastem.com/contact/): Email, WhatsApp, contact form
- [FAQ](https://primastem.com/faq/): Common questions about product, ordering, technical details
- [Product Sheet](https://primastem.com/sheet/): Distributor-focused specifications and pricing overview
- [Legal Notice](https://primastem.com/legal/): French mentions légales
- [Privacy Policy](https://primastem.com/privacy/): GDPR/RGPD compliant privacy policy

Available in 5 languages: English (default), French (/fr/), German (/de/), Spanish (/es/), Russian (/ru/)

- [German site](https://primastem.com/de/): Full site in Deutsch

## Documentation

- Full documentation: https://docs.primastem.com (10 languages)
- YouTube channel: https://youtube.com/@primastem

## Contact

- Email: info@primastem.com
- WhatsApp: +33 6 24 95 09 36
- Location: Cannes, France

## Pricing

- Distributors: wholesale from €235 excl. VAT (100+ units/year: €210, 500+: €200)
- Schools & families: available through our distributors — contact us

## Key Facts

- Material: Wood (robot, board), cardboard (tokens)
- Age range: 4–10
- Certification: CE & UKCA
- Made in: Cannes, France
- No screen, no app, no subscription
- Open NFC platform — tokens writable with free phone app
- Compatible with any grid map (step size adjustable: 10, 12, 15, 25 cm)
- Voice feedback in 14 languages — board speaks each command
- Documentation in 10 languages
